name: LTX-2.3 22B [dev] (Exact)
note: [LTX-2.3](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3) is a significant update to LTX-2 with improved audio and visual quality and enhanced prompt adherence. It is a state-of-the-art open-source audio-video foundation model developed by Lightricks and can generate synchronized video and audio within a single model. The [dev] checkpoint is the full model variant and is fully trainable. For best results, set Text Guidance to 3.5 and use 20–30 sampling steps.
